The '''lava cannon''' was an unusual weapon developed on the planet [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] which fired super heated rocks or ore at a target. It produced an extremely devastating path of destruction by spewing large globs of highly flammable, [[Magma/Legends|lava-like]] substance. The lava splash would hit all opponents within a short range of the target. As the fuel of the weapon was so heavy, it made the weapon somewhat difficult to wield. In the hands of a [[Commando/Legends|commando]], the cannon was especially dangerous.

A variant was the '''Devastator lava cannon'''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
